name: set_fill_color
description: Set a solid fill color for an object. Pass hex_color or cmyk_color. If both colors are specified, priority is given to cmyk_color. If the document is in CMYK mode, RGB color is automatically converted to its CMYK equivalent.

cmyk_color.description: Fill color in CMYK format (channel values from 0 to 100)

name: remove_fill
description: Removes the solid fill color entirely (no fill). Essential for laser cutting contours.

name: combine_shapes
description: Combines multiple paths into a single compound path using the even-odd fill rule. Required for shapes with inner holes (like 'O' or 'A') before cutting.

refs.description: List of shape references to combine.

name: weld_shapes
description: Welds multiple shapes into a single outline contour, merging overlapping paths. Used to clean intersecting shapes for a single cut path.

refs.description: List of shape references to weld.

name: simplify_curve
description: Reduces the number of nodes on a curve shape after tracing to smooth paths and improve cutting speed.

tolerance.description: Tolerance value (e.g., 0.1). Larger means fewer nodes.

name: set_outline
description: Set outline parameters for an object: color, thickness, and line style. To remove the outline, pass style='none'.

cmyk_color.description: Outline color in CMYK format (channel values from 0 to 100)

width.description: Outline line thickness in document units (doc.Unit)

style.description: Line style: no outline (none), solid, dashed (dash), dotted (dot), or dash-dotted (dash_dot)

name: flip
description: Flip an object horizontally or vertically relative to its center.

name: set_position
description: Move an object to page coordinates in document units (doc.Unit). X increases to the right, Y increases upwards from the bottom-left corner of the CorelDRAW page. By default, position is specified for the top-left corner of the object (anchor='top_left').

anchor.description: Anchor point for object positioning (default: top_left)

name: set_size
description: Set the width and height of an object in document units (doc.Unit). By default, scaling occurs relative to the top-left corner without maintaining proportions.

width.description: New object width in document units

height.description: New object height in document units

keep_aspect_ratio.description: Maintain aspect ratio of the object (default: false)

name: rotate
description: Rotate an object by a specified angle in degrees. Positive angle indicates counterclockwise rotation (CorelDRAW standard), negative indicates clockwise rotation. By default, rotation is performed relative to the center of the object.

name: duplicate
description: Duplicate an object. By default, the copy is created directly on top of the original (offset_x=0, offset_y=0). Returns the ref of the new copy.

offset_x.description: Horizontal X offset of the new copy (default: 0)

offset_y.description: Vertical Y offset of the new copy (default: 0)

name: delete_shape
description: Delete an object from the document.

name: convert_to_curves
description: Convert a shape or text object to curves (Convert to Curves).

name: order
description: Change the stacking order (z-order) of an object within the layer. Allows moving relative to layers (front/back/forward/backward) or relative to a specific target object (in_front_of/behind, requires passing target_ref).

target_ref.description: Identifier of the target object (required when mode is in_front_of or behind)

name: export_svg
description: Retrieve a visual preview (PNG) and current vector SVG data of the object to analyze its content, shape, geometry, and structure.

name: import_svg
description: Create a new vector object from SVG markup. If x and y coordinates are not specified, the new object is automatically centered on the selection or page.

anchor.description: Anchor point of the new SVG when placing at (x, y) (default: top_left)

name: replace_shape_svg
description: Replace an existing object with a new SVG contour in place. The old object is deleted, and the new one is placed exactly in its location while preserving coordinates and stacking order (z-order). By default, the new SVG automatically scales to match the dimensions of the old object (preserve_size=true).

ref.description: Identifier of the object to replace

preserve_size.description: Scale the new SVG to match the dimensions (width and height) of the old object (default: true). If false, it is inserted at the original viewBox size.

name: get_object_info
description: Retrieve detailed information and current physical properties of the selected object: shape type, coordinates (x, y), dimensions (width, height), rotation angle, fill/outline colors, layer, and stacking order.

name: trace_bitmap
description: Trace (vectorize) a raster image using PowerTRACE. The result appears on top of the original and is returned as new_refs; the source bitmap is not deleted by default.

name: get_page_info
description: Retrieves the active page constraints and the exact list of all shapes currently on the canvas, including fill and outline colors, and dimensions.

name: set_text
description: Change the content of a text block, as well as optionally its font family, size, color, and alignment. Styling parameters (font_name, font_size, hex_color, alignment) apply to the entire text block.

font_name.description: Font name (e.g., Arial, Times New Roman)

cmyk_color.description: Text color in CMYK format (channel values 0..100)

name: group_shapes
description: Group multiple selected objects into a single group.

refs.description: List of object identifiers to group

name: ungroup_shapes
description: Ungroup a group of objects.

name: align_objects
description: Align objects relative to each other or to the page.

refs.description: List of object identifiers to align

relative_to.description: Align relative to selection or page (default: selection)

name: distribute_objects
description: Evenly distribute selected objects horizontally or vertically.

refs.description: List of object identifiers to distribute

mode.description: Distribution mode: equal spacing between edges (equal_spaces) or between centers (equal_centers)
